message:
fix(ci): switch Linux release builds from musl to gnu

The uring-fs dependency (via fsqlite-wal) uses libc::statx which
doesn't exist in musl libc. Switch to gnu targets for Linux builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -57,18 +57,16 @@ jobs:
       fail-fast: false
       matrix:
         include:
-          # Linux x64 (musl, static) - portable across all Linux distros
-          - target: x86_64-unknown-linux-musl
+          # Linux x64 (gnu) - uring-fs dep requires glibc (no musl support)
+          - target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
             os: ubuntu-latest
             archive: tar.gz
             name: linux_amd64
-            musl: true
-          # Linux ARM64 (musl, static) - portable across all Linux distros
-          - target: aarch64-unknown-linux-musl
+          # Linux ARM64 (gnu)
+          - target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
             os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
             archive: tar.gz
             name: linux_arm64
-            musl: true
           # macOS Intel
           - target: x86_64-apple-darwin
             os: macos-15

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "beads_rust"
-version = "0.1.17"
+version = "0.1.18"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.88"
 description = "Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"
